# Fort Knox Self Storage - Vernal & Naples, UT

> The most affordable, high-security, mouse-proof storage in the Uintah Basin.

## Business Summary
Fort Knox Self Storage provides airtight, steel shipping container units in the Vernal/Naples area. Our units are specifically designed to prevent infestation and weather damage common in the Utah desert.

## Core Services
- **20ft Steel Containers:** $130/month. Ideal for apartment-sized storage.
- **40ft Steel Containers:** $230/month. High-capacity for full homes or commercial inventory.
- **Vehicle Parking:** $100/month. Secure outdoor storage for RVs, boats, and oil field equipment.
- **Special Offer:** 2 months FREE rent with a 6-month pre-paid contract.

## Key Features & Security
- **Airtight Protection:** 100% Mouse-proof, insect-proof, fireproof, and dust-proof construction.
- **Security:** Heavy-duty steel sea box containers with four padlock locking positions.
- **24/7 Access:** Round-the-clock yard access via gated entry.
- **Logistics:** Extra-wide graveled driveways designed for semi-trucks and moving vans.

## Location & Service Area
- **Physical Address:** 2225 South 3250 East, Vernal, Utah 84078
- **Service Regions:** Vernal, Naples, Jensen, and the greater Uintah Basin.
- **Google Maps:** [Link to your Google Profile]
